note: Delaware has no full-size branded truck stops directly on its interstates. The Delaware Welcome Center (Biden Welcome Center) on I-95 between exits 1 and 3 is a tolled-corridor service plaza with fuel and limited truck parking. Nearest full truck stops: TA Elkton, MD (I-95 exit 109 MD) and Flying J Carneys Point, NJ (off I-295 at US-40).

stops.name: Weigh Station (both directions)
stops.notes: Newark scales at the I-95 toll plaza just east of the MD line; Drivewyze bypass site

stops.name: Delaware Welcome Center (Biden Welcome Center)
stops.notes: Both directions between exits 1 and 3 on the Delaware Turnpike; fuel, food, limited truck parking

stops.name: Bayshore Ford Truck Sales
stops.notes: Commercial Ford truck dealer with parts and service departments; 4003 N DuPont Hwy (US 13) between the I-295 US 13/40 Farnhurst interchange and I-495 exit 1 (I-295 exits are unnumbered in DE)

stops.name: FleetPride Service Center (ARS Truck & Fleet)
stops.notes: Heavy-duty truck and trailer repair with 24-hr mobile service; 3065 New Castle Ave (DE 9) just south of the unnumbered I-295/DE 9 cloverleaf

stops.name: FleetPride Wilmington
stops.notes: Heavy-duty truck and trailer parts branch; 5 Medori Blvd off Christiana Ave, about 1 mi from exit 1 (US 13)

stops.name: 495 Truck Wash & Wash-Outs
stops.notes: 525 Terminal Ave; near Christiana's Truck Stop; daytime hours
